title: aquilegia ecalcarata subsp. micrantha
intro: Aquilegia ecalcarata subsp. micrantha is a plant species that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) and is native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Aquilegia ecalcarata subsp. micrantha include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
